name: text2audio-ai
description: Nx + pnpm monorepo for the Text2Audio AI project.

scripts.build: node tools/scripts/run-typescript-projects.js build && corepack pnpm web:build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm api:test && corepack pnpm web:test
scripts.typecheck: node tools/scripts/run-typescript-projects.js typecheck && corepack pnpm web:typecheck
scripts.api:serve: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm api:start
